message:
fix(trace_replay): prevent directory traversal via payload path resolution

Change resolve_payload_path() return type from PathBuf to io::Result<PathBuf>
and add canonicalization checks ensuring resolved paths stay within the base
directory. Improves error handling for payload_path operations using proper
Result chaining instead of unwrap.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
